untranslatable_reason: Signal requires (1) price deviation by 1.5 standard deviations from 20-period MA — price_pos_20 measures deviations from SMA but not specifically MA with 1.5σ scaling; (2) ATR comparison to 75th percentile of rolling 50-bar window — no built-in percentile indicator available; (3) partial position scaling at 66% of prior move amplitude — position sizing logic not expressible in entry/exit rules; (4) hard stop placement at 0.75 ATR beyond extreme — dynamic stop calculation not supported.
translation_notes: Converted CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction to bidirectional entry/exit rules. Used price_pos_20 (price position relative to 20-SMA) as approximation for extreme level, vol_ratio_20 for volume spike detection, bb_upper/bb_lower for reversal signals, and pivot points (r1/s1) for exit targets. ATR percentile comparison and position scaling logic cannot be directly expressed in the rule engine constraints.
